constructors.name: RenderSettings()
constructors.summary: Initialize a new instance of the RenderSettings class.

constructors.name: RenderSettings(RenderSettings)
constructors.summary: Initialize new instance of the RenderSettings class.

params.name: source
params.doc: If not null, settings are copied from source

methods.name: ConstructConstObject
methods.signature: protected void ConstructConstObject(Object parentObject, int subobjectIndex)
methods.summary: Assigns a parent object and a sub-object index to this.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.name: NonConstOperation
methods.summary: For derived classes implementers. Defines the necessary implementation to free the instance from being constant.

methods.name: OnSwitchToNonConst
methods.summary: Is called when a non-constant operation first occurs.

methods.name: ToJSON
methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

properties.name: AmbientLight
properties.summary: Gets or sets the ambient light color used in rendering.

properties.name: AntialiasLevel
properties.summary: Gets or sets anti-alias level, used for render quality

properties.name: BackgroundColorBottom
properties.summary: Gets or sets the background bottom color used in rendering.

properties.name: BackgroundColorTop
properties.summary: Gets or sets the background top color used in rendering. Sets also the background color if a solid background color is set.

properties.name: BackgroundStyle
properties.summary: How the viewport's background should be filled.

properties.name: DepthCue
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to render using depth cues. These are clues to help the perception of position and orientation of objects in the image.

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: Dithering
properties.summary: Get the document dithering interface

properties.name: FlatShade
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to render using flat shading.

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: ImageDpi
properties.summary: Number of dots/inch (dots=pixels) to use when printing and saving bitmaps. The default is 72.0 dots/inch.

properties.name: ImageSize
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the size of the rendering result if UseViewportSize is set to false. If UseViewportSize is set to true, then this value is ignored.

properties.name: ImageUnitSystem
properties.summary: unit system to use when converting image pixel size and DPI information into a print size. Default = inches

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: LinearWorkflow
properties.summary: Get the document linear workflow interface

properties.name: NamedView
properties.summary: Get or set the given named view

properties.name: RenderAnnotations
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to instruct the rendering engine to show annotations, such as linear dimensions or angular dimensions.

properties.name: RenderBackfaces
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to render back faces.

properties.name: RenderChannels
properties.summary: Get the document render channels interface

properties.name: RenderCurves
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to instruct the rendering engine to show curves.

properties.name: RenderIsoparams
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to instruct the rendering engine to show isocurves.

properties.name: RenderMeshEdges
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to instruct the rendering engine to show mesh edges.

properties.name: RenderPoints
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to instruct the rendering engine to show points.

properties.name: RenderSource
properties.summary: Gets or sets the render source RenderSettings.RenderingSources enumeration.

properties.name: ScaleBackgroundToFit
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to scale the wallpaper in the background or not. This is meaningful only if the viewport has a wallpaper and render settings are set to render Wallpaper into the background.

properties.name: ShadowmapLevel
properties.summary: 0=none, 1=normal, 2=best.

properties.name: Snapshot
properties.summary: Set or get the given snapshot view

properties.name: SpecificViewport
properties.summary: Set or get the given specific viewport

properties.name: TransparentBackground
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether rendering should be done with transparent background.

properties.name: UseHiddenLights
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to render using lights that are on layers that are off.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use sharable set of information.

properties.name: UseViewportSize
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the resolution of the viewport being rendered or ImageSize when rendering
